title: Playmates Toys
description: [AI generated] Playmates Toys is a Hong Kong-based toy manufacturer and distributor founded in 1966. The company operates in the consumer goods and toy industry, specializing in the design, production, and marketing of action figures, dolls, and interactive toys. It is widely recognized for producing licensed products based on popular entertainment franchises, including Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles and Star Trek, distributing its products globally across major retail markets.
